common

Interface ImageHandler

  • All Superinterfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BoxHandler, ChunkHandler, IFDHandler, RiffHandler, XmpHandler, XmpHandlerOld

    public interface ImageHandler
extends java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Defines the contract for a handler that processes image files and extracts structured metadata.
    Version:
    1.1
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean parseMetadata()
      Parses the image data and extracts metadata into internal structures.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.AutoCloseable

        close

    • Method Detail

      • parseMetadata

        boolean parseMetadata()
               throws java.io.IOException
        Parses the image data and extracts metadata into internal structures.
        Returns:
        true if metadata was successfully extracted, otherwise false
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if low-level I/O errors occur, or if the binary data is corrupt
